acceptance_criteria.text: The public serializer returns parseable schema-versioned graph JSON.
Serialization is deterministic and preserves ordered graph data.
Run serialization exposes only the compact signal and bottleneck overlay.
The API and schema types are publicly exported and documented.

tasks.title: Define the v1 schema and pure serializer at the diagram boundary
tasks.rollback_boundary: Revert the serializer and schema types in src/diagram.ts without touching the ASCII renderer.

tasks.title: Expose and document the additive public contract
tasks.rollback_boundary: Remove the new src/index.ts exports and JSON documentation together.

tasks.title: Add contract fixtures and prove text-renderer compatibility
tasks.rollback_boundary: Revert the JSON fixture/check and documentation; retain the pre-feature expected ASCII fixture.
